artifact_refs.description: Manual official-only notebook used to author the ASHRAE TC1 human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the canonical ASHRAE human baseline.
Maps each predicted bank action to the supporting notebook section.
Author notes for the ASHRAE human baseline.

notes: True bank-id authoring for tc1_from_scratch using an official-only repo-local notebook. The baseline selects the conservative primary spine plus the explicitly implemented model-specific branches for meter one-hot encoding, square_feet log transform, target log transform, and final column cleanup.
